.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line break in string assignment.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Integrate CRLFLogConverter marker into log statement to ensure safe logging of multi-line strings.
Update active profiles logging to show default profiles when no active profiles are explicitly set.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" in the error log string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update @EnableJpaRepositories annotation to use explicit array syntax for the basePackages attribute.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta-namespaced Hibernate5JakartaModule to support the Jakarta EE namespace required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer needed or have been replaced by a different error handling strategy.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and deleted their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot versions.
Refactor security configuration from the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to the modern SecurityFilterChain bean pattern required by Spring Security 5.7+/6.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { http.csrf(...).headers(...).authorizeHttpRequests(...); return http.build(); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support method-level security in newer Spring Security versions.
Update HTTP authorization rules from the deprecated antMatchers() to the new requestMatchers() syntax.
Migrate Content-Security-Policy configuration from the deprecated header writer to the new lambda-based configuration API.
Migrate Feature-Policy/Permissions-Policy configuration to the new lambda-based API and updated policy syntax.
Migrate frame options configuration from the deprecated deny() method to the new sameOrigin() lambda configuration.
Update CSRF token handling to use the new CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler to fix compatibility with modern Spring Security CSRF processing.
Remove imports for classes that are no longer used or have been replaced in the new security configuration style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter, WebSecurity, HttpMethod, CsrfFilter, CorsFilter, SecurityProblemSupport

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add imports for new Spring Security classes required by the modern configuration style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added: SecurityFilterChain, BasicAuthenticationFilter, CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler, CustomClaimConverter, SpaWebFilter

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify the constructor by removing dependencies on CorsFilter and SecurityProblemSupport which are no longer injected into this configuration class.
Introduce a new SpaWebFilter to handle Single Page Application specific security requirements in the filter chain.
Introduce a new CookieCsrfFilter to handle CSRF token management via cookies in the filter chain.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed RESOURCE_LOCATIONS from including 'classpath:/static/app/' to just 'classpath:/static/'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced RESOURCE_PATHS array with specific patterns like '/*.js', '/*.css', '/*.svg', '/*.png', '*.ico', '/content/**', and '/i18n/*'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException since StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, supporting newer Spring Security/Cors APIs.
Update CORS registration to use Swagger UI 3 endpoints instead of Swagger 2 endpoints.
Clean up unused imports resulting from the migration and code simplification.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException, java.util.*, javax.servlet.*, org.springframework.http.MediaType
